title: Facilitator Guide — Day 13 — Why This Business Scales
prepChecklist: Open FEC Box 6 reference in Venture Design Studio
Brief mentors: no compensation discussion today

sessionFlow.activity: Deck 01 — Scalability and client growth flywheel
sessionFlow.notes: One client → referral → five → twenty → recurring → growing practice.
Personalize with Week 2 segment and first-client strategy.
Advisor Excellence, Team & Leadership, Systems & Scale.

debriefQuestions: What makes this venture scalable vs a salary job?
Which growth engine did squads prioritize?
How do referrals connect to Week 2 empathy work?
commonPitfalls: Jumping to compensation before venture model is clear
Treating Box 6 as abstract — keep it personal
coachingTips: Ask: what happens at client 1, 5, and 20?
